---
date: 2026/04/01
date-format: long
date-modified: last-modified
listing: 
  - id: news
    max-description-length: 500
    fields: [title, description, image, date, categories]
    contents: "news"
    sort: "date desc" 
    type: grid
    grid-item-border: true
    categories: true
---

  <!-- Maintainer note:
  Add new items by creating a new .qmd file in Activities/news/.
  This page is an automatic listing and should usually not need content edits.
  -->

::: {#news}
:::
